title: Methil More Ores
description: The Methil More Ores mod that is just a normal mod that add the Methil Ore !
body:
# Methil More Ores

![methil-more-ores-banner.png](https://github.com/methil-mods/methil-more-ores/raw/main/readme/methil-more-ores-banner.png)

## About

Methil More Ores expands Minecraft by introducing Methil Ore, a new, rare mineral that brings exciting possibilities to your world. Found deep underground, Methil can be mined and refined to create Methil Tools and Methil Armor, offering greater durability and power than traditional materials.

Additionally, emeralds now have new uses! Craft Emerald Tools and Emerald Armor to enhance your gameplay, giving more value to those shiny gems you’ve been collecting. Delve into the depths, discover Methil, and unlock a whole new tier of crafting!

> Note: This mod requires Kotlin for Forge to run properly. Make sure to install it!

## Features

For more informations about the feature of the mod, check the [readme](https://github.com/methil-mods/methil-more-ores/blob/main/README.md)
